## What needs doing
A clear, self-contained description of the task.

## Why it matters
How this fits into the project and what value it adds.

## Definition of done
- [ ] Code change implemented
- [ ] Tests added / updated (`pytest --cov=luckyd_code` still passes ≥ 97%)
- [ ] Type hints added if the touched module is already in mypy's checked set
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] PR description explains *what* and *why*
